title: Compressor Tank Sizing Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool for sizing compressed air receiver tanks based on demand, pressure, and system dynamics. Compliant with ISO 8573-1, CAGI, and Lean Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Compressor Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Rated free air delivery of the compressor at standard conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rated free air delivery of the compressor at standard conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresörün standart koşullardaki anma serbest hava debisi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit d'air libre nominal du compresseur dans des conditions standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suministro de aire libre nominal del compresor en condiciones estándar.

inputs.label: Average Demand Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average compressed air consumption of the system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average compressed air consumption of the system.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation moyenne d'air comprimé du système.
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo promedio de aire comprimido del sistema.

label_i18n.fr: Débit de pointe de la demande

businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler momentaner Bedarf während des Betriebs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Demande instantanée maximale pendant le fonctionnement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Demanda máxima instantánea durante la operación.

inputs.label: Peak Demand Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the peak demand event.

label_i18n.fr: Durée de la demande de pointe

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the peak demand event.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de l'événement de demande de pointe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del evento de demanda pico.

inputs.label: System Operating Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Nominal pressure at which the system operates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal pressure at which the system operates.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nenndruck, bei dem das System arbeitet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression nominale à laquelle le système fonctionne.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión nominal a la que opera el sistema.

inputs.label: Allowable Pressure Differential
inputs.businessContext: Maximum acceptable pressure drop during peak event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum acceptable pressure drop during peak event.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tepe olayı sırasında izin verilen maksimum basınç düşüşü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal akzeptabler Druckabfall während des Spitzenereignisses.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chute de pression maximale acceptable pendant un événement de pointe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caída de presión máxima aceptable durante el evento pico.

inputs.label: Compressor Control Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of compressor capacity control, affects tank sizing factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of compressor capacity control, affects tank sizing factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresör kapasite kontrol tipi, tank boyutlandırma faktörünü etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Art der Kompressorleistungsregelung, beeinflusst den Tankdimensionierungsfaktor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type de régulation de capacité du compresseur, affecte le facteur de dimensionnement du réservoir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de control de capacidad del compresor, afecta el factor de dimensionamiento del tanque.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Average ambient temperature at compressor location.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average ambient temperature at compressor location.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température ambiante moyenne à l'emplacement du compresseur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura ambiente promedio en la ubicación del compresor.

rules.message: Average demand must be less than compressor flow rate to allow tank charging.
Peak duration must be greater than zero.
Pressure differential must be greater than zero.
Peak demand should exceed compressor flow rate to justify tank sizing.

thresholds.message: Calculated tank size is very small; consider if a tank is needed.
Calculated tank size is large; verify demand profile and consider multiple tanks.
High leakage detected; leak reduction can significantly reduce required tank size.
Very low pressure differential may lead to frequent compressor cycling.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
